scripts.migrate: node -e "(async()=>{const p=require('path');const {createLogger}=require('./src/logger');const {openDatabase,applyPragmas,runMigrations,closeDatabase}=require('./src/db');require('dotenv').config({path:p.resolve(__dirname,process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?'.env.production':'.env.development')});const l=createLogger();const db=await openDatabase(process.env.DB_PATH||p.join(__dirname,'hotel.db'),l);await applyPragmas(db,l);await runMigrations(db,p.join(__dirname,'migrations'),l);await closeDatabase(db);l.info('migrations complete');})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
